title: [Skyship, Living Corridor]
description: The corridor is lined by metal shelves attached floor-to-ceiling onto the bulkheads.  Some books are placed on the shelves, but far more are scattered across the floor, their torn pages rustling as air moves down the path.  Thick metal benches are set along the corridor, placed in sections with gaps in the shelving, also covered with books.  Tomes and parchment in varying states of deterioration surround these benches in large piles, as if they had been indiscriminately shoved out of the way.
